ticket.subject: I would like to follow up with regarding the statu...
ticket.raw_subject: I would like to follow up with regarding the statu...
ticket.description:
I would like to follow up with regarding the status of adding the "mark as fufilled" button to the individual order label screens (i was told this was being worked on but this was 6+ months ago). Also, why do deleted shopify products not get removed from PH? Also if a product name is changed and/or a variant status is changed it becomes a duplicate product on PH. PluginHive is becoming a mess to manage. Another issue i broght up before and STILL hasnt been fixed is the fact that products that include variants do not appear in product search when using SKU (must use product name). I was told this would be fixed and still hasn't. 

Could you please provide timelines on the stuff that were meant to be fixed. Also, advice on the issues that are not being worked on. If there is no plan to fix the broken application we should not be getting charged full price and would request a discount if no timeline can be provided. 

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.com/home/products/view/status/allproducts?pageNumber=1

comments.plain_body:
I would like to follow up with regarding the status of adding the "mark as fufilled" button to the individual order label screens (i was told this was being worked on but this was 6+ months ago). Also, why do deleted shopify products not get removed from PH? Also if a product name is changed and/or a variant status is changed it becomes a duplicate product on PH. PluginHive is becoming a mess to manage. Another issue i broght up before and STILL hasnt been fixed is the fact that products that include variants do not appear in product search when using SKU (must use product name). I was told this would be fixed and still hasn't.  

 Could you please provide timelines on the stuff that were meant to be fixed. Also, advice on the issues that are not being worked on. If there is no plan to fix the broken application we should not be getting charged full price and would request a discount if no timeline can be provided.  

 ------------------

comments.body:
Hello Ashur,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team is currently working on enhancing the Single Label Generation flow and the UX of the app. The requested features will also be available as part of this enhancement. As this is a major release, we do not have an exact ETA at the moment.

However, considering your request and commitment to your satisfaction, we can offer a 3-month free subscription for your store. I hope this helps and we appreciate your understanding and support.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ashur,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Our team is currently working on enhancing the Single Label Generation flow and the UX of the app. The requested features will also be available as part of this enhancement. As this is a major release, we do not have an exact ETA at the moment.
 
However, considering your request and commitment to your satisfaction, we can offer a 3-month free subscription for your store. I hope this helps and we appreciate your understanding and support.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Keerthi,


When trying to access the app after the changes made on your side I am presented with a blank screen. This is occurring on two different computers, one of which has attempted to access using private browsing and still experiences the same result.



In the Shopify admin, there is also no prompt to approve a new billing cycle, and it cannot be done via the app either as it is not loading.



Your prompt assistance is appreciated.



Kind regards,

David B.

 ![Screenshot 2024-07-16 at 9.41.43 am.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/hF109vyOJyO5kO9wtVHrpNAFs/?name=Screenshot+2024-07-16+at+9.41.43%E2%80%AFam.png) ![Screenshot 2024-07-16 at 9.40.05 am.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/MtOljbVpXUjakMUV2JtDR4r5u/?name=Screenshot+2024-07-16+at+9.40.05%E2%80%AFam.png) ![Screen Shot 2022-07-04 at 9.14.55 am.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/lYJdEcG6W8xXlD0bsGHhPtOOr/?name=Screen+Shot+2022-07-04+at+9.14.55+am.png)
comments.html_body:
Hi Keerthi, 

When trying to access the app after the changes made on your side I am presented with a blank screen. This is occurring on two different computers, one of which has attempted to access using private browsing and still experiences the same result. 

In the Shopify admin, there is also no prompt to approve a new billing cycle, and it cannot be done via the app either as it is not loading. 

Your prompt assistance is appreciated.

Kind regards,
David B.

comments.body:
Hello David & Team,

This might happen when the app charges are not accepted by the admin of the store. Could you please inform the store admin to access the app and approve the charges?

If the problem persists, could you please approve the collaborator request we sent to email office@aandswelding.com.au and give us permission to approve the charges so that we can check and get back to you?

Do let us know how it goes.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello David & Team,
 
This might happen when the app charges are not accepted by the admin of the store. Could you please inform the store admin to access the app and approve the charges?
 
If the problem persists, could you please approve the collaborator request we sent to email office@aandswelding.com.au and give us permission to approve the charges so that we can check and get back to you?
 
Do let us know how it goes.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

I have provided collaborator access as of this email being sent



Thanks for your help,

David B.

comments.body:
Hello David,

I hope you’re doing well!

I’m reaching out to inform you that the "Mark as Fulfilled" option you requested is now live and available on the single order edit page. We appreciate your feedback and are glad to make this enhancement for you.

Additionally, we have introduced more new UI enhancements designed to make the shipment process flow even easier. I’d be happy to connect with you over a call to walk you through these updates and ensure you're getting the most out of the new features.

Please let me know your availability, and we can schedule a call at your convenience.

Looking forward to your response.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/HvLWnuZV55PdfBhvyPAcbKEwv/?name=Screenshot+2024-09-13+at+2.01.13+PM.png)

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive | Customer Success Manager
comments.html_body:

comments.body:
Hi Keerthi,


Thank you very much for your reply and the addition of these new features which we have immediately picked up on and have helped us improve our workflow in the creation of labels and fulfilment of orders.



Does this update release include fixes for the product search function not displaying products when searching by SKUs for variant products? As well as products remaining on PH product lists despite being deleted from Shopify or are these still being worked on?



Kind regards,

David B.

 ![Screen Shot 2022-07-04 at 9.14.55 am.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/qpNteExD4XmIjBMlAFAf0Bwu2/?name=Screen+Shot+2022-07-04+at+9.14.55+am.png)
comments.html_body:
Hi Keerthi, 

Thank you very much for your reply and the addition of these new features which we have immediately picked up on and have helped us improve our workflow in the creation of labels and fulfilment of orders. 

Does this update release include fixes for the product search function not displaying products when searching by SKUs for variant products? As well as products remaining on PH product lists despite being deleted from Shopify or are these still being worked on? 

Kind regards,
David B.

comments.body:
Hello David,

Thank you for getting back to me. We are glad to know that your workflow has been improved with this feature.

I also wanted to inform you that we have added additional enhancements to the Label Batch Processing flow, Live Tracking updates to Shopify orders page and more. These features have been enabled for your store as well. Please feel free to explore them and share your feedback.

Our team is actively working on app enhancements. We’re currently rolling out improvements for the **Label Processing** flow, and soon, we will focus on enhancing the **Settings UI and Products UI.**

In the meantime, I wanted to understand your workflow for Product Variant SKUs better. Specifically, how and when you use them and how you’re currently managing them. It would be great if we could connect for a call to discuss this further. Please let me know when you’d be available.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive | Customer Success Manager
comments.html_body:
Hello David,
 
Thank you for getting back to me. We are glad to know that your workflow has been improved with this feature. 
 
I also wanted to inform you that we have added additional enhancements to the Label Batch Processing flow, Live Tracking updates to Shopify orders page and more. These features have been enabled for your store as well. Please feel free to explore them and share your feedback.
 
Our team is actively working on app enhancements. We’re currently rolling out improvements for the Label Processing flow, and soon, we will focus on enhancing the Settings UI and Products UI.
 
In the meantime, I wanted to understand your workflow for Product Variant SKUs better. Specifically, how and when you use them and how you’re currently managing them. It would be great if we could connect for a call to discuss this further. Please let me know when you’d be available.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive | Customer Success Manager
